title: Warm up
content: The slide illustrates three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each city is represented by a distinct driving scene.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide highlights the modernization within China's cities. Images of taxis and urban landscapes depict vibrant growth.
key_claims: Images of taxis and urban landscapes

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines the session objectives to investigate city characteristics. It includes steps from local features to development strategies and their outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide connects specific development strategies to Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide views city development from a taxi driver's perspective. It discusses the unique development strategies of each city based on local features.
